name: Indicator
visual_summary: An indicator component is used to show a status or a warning to the user. It has different styles and positions to fit various design needs. Developers would use this component when they need to attract attention or provide feedback.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Indicator
Description: An indicator component is used to show a status or a warning to the user. It has different styles and positions to fit various design needs. Developers would use this component when they need to attract attention or provide feedback.
Style: dot, triangle, line
Interactions: static, hover, active
Tags: status, alert, warning

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
